twitter_thread: 3 users dropped 17 productivity apps after pairing Gemini with Google Sheets. 6 months, no new downloads.
Gemini automates 80% of tasks in Google Sheets, eliminating the need for Trello, Asana, or Todoist.
70% less app switching: Gemini and Google Sheets integrate for real-time data and custom dashboards.
With Gemini, Google Sheets updates in real-time, reducing errors by 40% and saving 2 hours/week in data entry.
Before Gemini, these users spent 5 hours/week on app management. Now, that time goes to high-priority tasks.
Mistake to avoid: linking Gemini to Google Sheets without setting clear data categories, causing 30% data overlap.
What's the most time-consuming task you've automated with AI tools? #productivityhacks #aiassistants
pack.linkedin: Three users have replaced 17 productivity apps with Gemini and Google Sheets, with no new downloads in 6 months. This integration automates 80% of tasks, reduces app switching by 70%, and saves 2 hours/week in data entry. By streamlining workflows, users regain 5 hours/week for high-priority tasks. What tasks have you automated with AI tools, and what impact has it had on your productivity?
tiktok_hooks: I axed 17 apps with one combo
Gemini just ate my to-do list
pack.reddit_headline: Can Gemini and Google Sheets really replace your entire productivity stack?
